---
title: "Additional Data Stewardship Resources"
format: html
---

### List of resources here

 - Underwater Glider User Group - [Data Management Tools](https://underwatergliders.org/glider-resources/data-management-tools/)
 - FAIR Data Training for Deep Ocean Early Career Researchers: [Syllabus and slide presentations](https://darchive.mblwhoilibrary.org/entities/publication/3c9f2ea4-ab3d-49ec-bdb8-25b22add5418)
